channel.title: productivity on Cozi
channel.description: Recent content in productivity on Cozi

item.title: Leveling Up Claude Code with Superpowers
item.description: A while back I wrote about spec-driven development with Spec Kit, which fixed the “the agent built the wrong thing” problem by making me write the spec before any code.

item.title: Spec-Driven Development with GitHub Spec Kit
item.description: I have been using AI coding agents long enough to know the failure mode by heart.
